title: atractocarpus tenuiflorus
intro: Atractocarpus tenuiflorus, also known as the 'Prairie Rose', is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Atractocarpus tenuiflorus include its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Atractocarpus tenuiflorus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
